message:
fix(demo,runtime): minor tweaks for demo screens and allocation budget

Small fixes and refinements identified during final review.

dashboard.rs:
- Fix chart axis label alignment
- Correct sparkline buffer overflow edge case
- Improve metric refresh timing consistency

shakespeare.rs:
- Fix line number display offset
- Correct scroll position calculation

allocation_budget.rs:
- Fix threshold comparison operator
- Improve budget calculation precision
- Add missing bounds check

These minor fixes ensure consistent behavior across all scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
